title: Successful login and dashboard access
description: A valid user can log in and reach the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Create a task for a project
description: This test verifies that an authorized user can create a task with project, assignee, and deadline details and see it added to the task list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the task title field with a unique task name
Fill in the task description field with a task description
Fill in a valid task deadline
Verify the new task appears in the task list

title: Logout returns to the login page
description: An authenticated user can end the session and return to the login screen.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Submit proof for a task
description: This test verifies that an assignee can submit proof with a note and see the task move into review status.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the proof note field with a submission note
Attach proof using the file input
Verify the task is in review status

title: Block unauthorized access to the Users page
description: This test verifies that an unauthorized role is redirected away from the Users page instead of seeing user management controls.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user is redirected away from the Users page

title: Review submitted proof
description: This test verifies that a reviewer can approve or reject submitted proof and see the task status update.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the task status is updated

title: Reopen an approved task with a reason
description: This test verifies that an authorized user can reopen an approved task by providing a required reason and see the task return to active work.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the task returns to active work

title: Create a project with members
description: This test verifies that an authorized user can create a project with the required details and see it added to the project list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the project title field with a unique project name
Fill in the project description field with a project description
Fill in a valid project deadline
Verify the new project appears in the project list

title: Invalid login shows an error
description: An invalid password prevents access and shows a visible authentication error.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Verify a login error message is visible

title: Filter notifications by status
description: This test verifies that a member can narrow the notifications inbox using a status filter and see the list update accordingly.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the notifications list is narrowed to the selected status

title: Mark a notification as read
description: This test verifies that a user can mark an unread notification as read and see its unread state change in the inbox.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Mark an unread notification as read
Verify the notification is shown as read

title: Dashboard metrics and navigation are available after login
description: A signed-in user can view dashboard metrics and navigate to other main sections from the sidebar.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Open project details and review project information
description: This test verifies that an authorized user can open an existing project and view its details, members, tasks, progress, and status.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open an existing project from the list
Verify project members and task progress are displayed

title: Delete a notification
description: This test verifies that a user can delete a notification after confirmation and see it removed from the inbox.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Delete a notification and confirm the action
Verify the notification is removed from the inbox

title: Task list is accessible from the main navigation
description: After logging in, a user can open the tasks section from the sidebar and view the task list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Open a linked notification target

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Generate a deadline reminder

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Repeated invalid login attempts trigger lockout
description: Repeated failed sign-in attempts result in a temporary lockout message that blocks immediate retry.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Verify a temporary lockout message is visible

title: Edit permitted project fields

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Edit the project title field with a new unique project name

Verify the updated project details are displayed
